---
title: "Chronic physiological stress along precipitation and fragmentation gradients"
image: "../images/card_pics/fragment_edge.jpg"
description: "This study measures stress hormones in birds across rainfall and habitat-fragmentation gradients. We are testing how these two global environmental drivers interact to affect health and resilience of tropical bird species."
categories: ["Panama PLUMAS Project"]
contributors: "PLUMAS Team, Angela Zhu, Nar Trippel"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
